stories.title: Tia Milloy — Day 38 and the July 4 Clock

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Day 38. No confirmed destination.

July 4 weekend is two days away — the last natural window before PGF Nationals splits recruiting attention on July 19.

FSU is in active conversations. Tennessee and Texas Tech remain in the picture.

#CollegeSoftball #TransferPortal

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
July 4 weekend is two days away.

After that, coaching staffs begin preparing to travel to PGF Nationals.

The program that closes Tia Milloy before July 19 gets her — and the summer.

#CollegeSoftball #TransferPortal

stories.title: Conference Realignment July 1 — Big 12 and AAC Add Softball Programs

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The Big 12 is getting bigger.

UCF, Houston, and BYU officially joined the conference's softball lineup on July 1.

The last three national champions are in the Big 12. Now the most talent-rich recruiting territories in the country are too.

#CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Conference realignment took effect July 1 across college softball.

UCF brings Florida recruiting. Houston brings Texas. The Big 12 already produced the last three national champions.

The AAC also expanded — Charlotte, FAU, North Texas, UAB, and UTSA are in.

#CollegeSoftball

article.headline: The Big 12 Just Got Bigger: What July 1 Realignment Means for College Softball

stories.title: NiJaree Canady Signs AUSL Deal — Ends 3-Day Holdout, Joins Texas Volts

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady is signed and ready to play.

She missed the Texas Volts' first two AUSL games after a three-day contract holdout. She signed her deal and is cleared.

100+ wins. 1,000+ strikeouts. The pro career is officially underway.

#Softball #AUSL

article.headline: NiJaree Canady Ends AUSL Holdout, Signs With Texas Volts — Pro Career Is On

stories.title: The Four-Coach Era Begins — What July 1 Means for D1 Softball

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
July 1 changed college softball.

D1 programs can now employ four paid coaches — up from three. The rule went into effect yesterday.

Programs with big budgets add a fourth coordinator. Programs with tight budgets face a harder choice.

#CollegeSoftball

article.headline: The Four-Coach Era Is Here: What July 1's NCAA Rule Change Means for D1 Softball

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: PGF Nationals — 17 Days Out, the 2027 Class Takes Center Stage

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
17 days until PGF Nationals.

Great Park Irvine. Every major coaching staff in the country. The Class of 2028 on display.

Programs that closed their 2027 rosters in the portal are already looking past July 19 to September 1.

#CollegeSoftball #Recruiting
